description:
Parent epic: V3 E7: Errors, debugging, and inspection

Source task 4/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add call graph, timeline, request summary, and state/context projections.

Epic closure criteria:
- users can answer what happened in a turn without reading logs
- errors are normalized, readable, and safe to display
- debugging output is structured, bounded, and safe by default

comments.text: Completed the remaining projection hardening by making Agent.View debug event payloads and refs display-safe with bounded content previews, omitted large/raw fields, and redacted secrets. Added coverage for tool call, tool result, and context operation projections while existing timeline/call graph/request summary helpers remain covered. Verified with focused Agent.View tests plus full format, compile, test, docs, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E7: Add call graph, timeline, request summary, and state/context projections
